summary: Made two surgical seam edits to tighten chapter entry from chapter 6's alias beat and to better hand off chapter 7's fallout into chapter 8's accounting-driven aftermath.
edits: Anchored the opening to Lucie calling Elise 'Jeanne' at the trapdoor so the transition from chapter 6 lands more directly.
Adjusted the closing paragraph to frame Clemence's suspicion in her ledger-like accounting logic, strengthening the bridge into the next chapter's inventory of losses.
Verified that no calibration-only example_lines from the style bible appear in the chapter text.
